200000.name: IDTest Cash
descriptionLines: When used, gives 1 Fly Wing.

200001.name: Caixa Grande de Expansão de Inventário
200001.unidentifiedName: Caixa Grande de Expansão de Inventário
descriptionLines: ^ff0000Intransferível.^000000
Caixa contendo 10 Tickets de Expansão de Inventário.
^0000ffLimite de itens no inventário +10.^000000
^0000ffPode ser usado 10 vezes, sendo cumulativo.^000000
^0000ffO efeito é permanente e não pode ser revertido.^000000

200002.name: (Limited) Inventory Expansion Voucher Box (10)
descriptionLines: A box containing 10 Inventory Expansion Voucher, which are used to expe your inventory.
<TIPBOX>How to use<INFO>65</INFO></TIPBOX>
^FF0000Este item não é reembolsável.^000000

200003.name: (Limited) HD Oridecon Box(Blacksmith)(30)
descriptionLines: (Limited) A box containing 30 HD Oridecon and 3 Blacksmiths Blessing.
A delicate ore that guarantees the safety of valuable equipment.
- If you fail to refine a weapon with a nível de refinamento of +7 ou superior, the weapon is not destroyed and the nível de refinamento is decreased by 1 instead. It can't refine past +10. -
(If the refine attempt fails, the nível de refinamento Diminui by 1.)

200004.name: (Limited) HD Elunium Box(Blacksmith)(30)
descriptionLines: (Limited) A box containing 30 HD Elunium and 3 Blacksmiths Blessing.
A delicate ore that guarantees the safety of valuable equipment.
- If you fail to refine a armor with a nível de refinamento of +7 ou superior, the armor is not destroyed and the nível de refinamento is decreased by 1 instead. It can't refine past +10. -

200005.name: (Limited) HD Bradium Box(Blacksmith)(30)
descriptionLines: (Limited) A box containing 30 HD Bradium and 3 Blacksmiths Blessing.
It has been compressed for a very long time, resulting in higher density and strength. It seems that it has become more difficult to refine weapons.
- If you fail to refine a weapon with a nível de refinamento of +10 ou superior, the weapon is not destroyed. -
(If the refine attempt fails, the nível de refinamento Diminui by 1.)

200006.name: (Limited) HD Carnium Box(Blacksmith)(30)
descriptionLines: (Limited) A box containing 30 HD Carnium and 3 Blacksmiths Blessing.

- If you fail to refine a armor with a nível de refinamento of +10 ou superior, the armor is not destroyed. -

200032.name: (Limited) Three Master Package
descriptionLines: ^ff0000This item cannot be traded with other accounts.^000000
The upgraded package of the legendary three people!!! is written on the box.
A box containing 50 Small Mana Potion, 100 Small Life Potion, 100 Medium Life Potion, 100 Mysterious Life Potion.
You can get 13 Katsua Secret Keys additionally
^ff0000If you open this item, it is not refundable anymore.^000000
